_description: Foundational industry concepts — migrated from concepts DB table. These are reference knowledge pages, not dynamic content.
_deprecation_note: The concepts DB table is STILL ACTIVELY READ by api/index.ts for wiki pages, wiki detail, and dashboard stats. It holds rich markdown content served to the frontend. DO NOT DROP. This config file is a reference copy of concept definitions only.

concepts.title: Building Materials Value Chain
concepts.description: End-to-end value chain from raw material extraction through manufacturing, distribution, and installation.

concepts.title: Construction Cycle Analysis
concepts.description: Understanding the cyclical nature of construction markets: leading indicators, lag effects, and turning points.

concepts.title: Tariff & Trade Impact

concepts.title: Residential vs. Nonresidential Split
concepts.description: Key differences in demand drivers, cyclicality, and company exposure between residential and nonresidential construction.
